channel.title: Iast on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Iast on ZAP

item.title: OWASP PTK Findings as ZAP Alerts (Juice Shop Walkthrough)
item.description: OWASP PTK 9.8.0 and the ZAP OWASP PTK add-on 0.3.0 now let ZAP display OWASP PTK findings directly as ZAP Alerts. This post shows how to install the add-on, choose which PTK rules to run (SAST / IAST / DAST), optionally auto-start scans on browser launch, and then scan OWASP Juice Shop with all results visible in ZAP.

item.title: OWASP PTK Integration with ZAP
item.description: OWASP PTK is now pre-installed in the browsers launched by ZAP (Chrome, Edge and Firefox). This post shows how to run PTK’s DAST, IAST, SAST, and SCA inside the same authenticated session you’re testing, plus practical JWT and cookie workflows—while ZAP remains your traffic and context hub.
